testing_gaps.description: No dedicated unit test validates sidebar lesson numbering consistency across flat, root-folder, and nested-folder cases. The fix relies on the existing groupIndexMap lookup which is already correct, but a regression test covering `FolderTreeNode` with a populated `groupIndexMap` prop would make the numbering contract explicit.
testing_gaps.suggestion: Consider a render test for FolderTreeNode that passes a known groupIndexMap and asserts that MaterialGroupRow receives the expected index prop for items inside folders and subfolders.
